# Compressed matte atom

**Data field**

An atom that specifies the image description structure and the matte data associated with a particular matte atom.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Compressed_matte_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in this track matte atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
